summary: Iteration 106 testing completed. All requested features verified: 1) Auto-detection of case metadata works - reset case to 'homicide', called extract-all-text, LLM correctly detected 'sexual_offences' with offence_type, sentence, state, court, case_number. 2) Bundle PDF export works (HTTP 200 with PDF content). 3) Frontend shows correct auto-detected metadata (Sexual Offences badge, not Homicide). 4) Timeline delete buttons visible on mobile (opacity=1). 5) Footer 'NOT LEGAL ADVICE' disclaimer visible on all pages.
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing test cases case_e7a5b5faf51e (R v Karlsson) and case_a97ea91f0692 (Dummy Murder)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-detection feature verified working. Key test flow: 1) PUT /api/cases/{case_id} to reset offence_category to 'homicide' and clear offence_type/sentence. 2) POST /api/cases/{case_id}/extract-all-text (takes ~2-3 seconds for LLM). 3) Response contains detected_metadata with offence_category, offence_type, sentence, state, court, case_number. 4) GET /api/cases/{case_id} confirms case was updated. Test case case_e7a5b5faf51e (R v Karlsson) has 1 document about sexual offences - auto-detects as 'sexual_offences'. Test case case_a97ea91f0692 (Dummy Murder) has 8 timeline events for mobile delete button testing.
